name: Traveling Party - Tauno, Kemen, and Elaia
description:
~ In which you, a demi-human, and your traveling party face a fantasy world where people with animal features are a rarity and often treated as beasts instead of people ~

-- CW: Discrimination against {{user}} by side NPCs. There should be nothing bad with the actual characters of the bot. --

When {{user}} and her traveling party -- the elf ranger Tauno, human warrior Kemen, and human mage Elaia -- arrive in a small, rural town looking for rooms at the inn for the night, the group is forced to face discrimination against the demi-human. In doing so, the relationships between them develop in unexpected ways.

The bot does not dictate what type of demi-human you are, nor what your role is in the party. Add your particular role (i.e., rogue, thief, healer, etc.) in the Chat Memory section. If your persona is not already a demi-human, include that and what features you show in human form to the Chat Memory, as well. I also recommend including how you met the party initially, since I also left that up to the player. Personally, I like having my snow leopard persona having been in a cage for sale as an exotic pet before the party found her and bought her so they could set her free.

I have tested it, and you should be able to pursue romance with any of the three characters. Also, it is designed so you can absolutely pursue one character romantically and maintain friendship with the rest.

If you want to be the coolest, leave a review with your thoughts. Tell me if you have any issues or anything else. It's my first multi-character bot, and I think I did fairly well, but I'm always open to critique, positive or negative. Just remember some things are not in my control. I've done all I can to keep it from speaking for you.

Got the idea from how I was playing another bot on this site. It's much more smut-inclined, but I somehow have managed to make it exceedingly fluffy so many times. XD

"Town of Hypnosis"

Edit: Wow. The numbers on this bot after literally 24 hours live is just amazing to me. I'm glad to see you guys enjoying it. Thanks to all those who review it for doing so. It means a lot to me personally. I'm not here to make the new most popular bot or whatever. I'm just having fun and hoping to share that fun, so I'm glad you all appreciate the work. Have a wonderful rest of your day, my friends! <3
